fixture: 021_create_selects

statement 1:
  sql:
    CREATE TABLE widgets (id INTEGER NOT NULL, qty INTEGER NOT NULL)
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 0

statement 2:
  sql:
    INSERT INTO widgets VALUES (1, 10)
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 1

statement 3:
  sql:
    INSERT INTO widgets VALUES (2, 20)
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 1

statement 4:
  sql:
    SELECT id, qty FROM widgets
  result:
    query
    columns:
      [0] id INTEGER NOT NULL
      [1] qty INTEGER NOT NULL
    rows:
      [0] 1 | 10
      [1] 2 | 20

statement 5:
  sql:
    SELECT qty FROM widgets WHERE id = 2
  result:
    query
    columns:
      [0] qty INTEGER NOT NULL
    rows:
      [0] 20
